report.title: e-Surveyor: Conservation Statuses
report.description: Report for a user's species data conservation statuses in e-Surveyor
report.query:
-- category designation occurrence_count species_count
SELECT 'Your area' AS category, lr.local_rarity as designation, COUNT(distinct o.id) AS occurrence_count, COUNT(distinct cttl.taxon_meaning_id) AS species_count FROM cache_occurrences_functional o JOIN cache_taxa_taxon_lists cttl ON cttl.id=o.preferred_taxa_taxon_list_id LEFT JOIN esurveyor.local_rarity lr ON lr.tvk=cttl.external_key AND lr.sq100km='#sq100km#' #joins# WHERE o.survey_id=#survey_id# #filters# GROUP BY 1, 2 UNION SELECT 'GB' AS category, national_rarity as designation, COUNT(distinct o.id) AS occurrence_count, COUNT(distinct cttl.taxon_meaning_id) AS species_count FROM cache_occurrences_functional o JOIN cache_taxa_taxon_lists cttl ON cttl.id=o.preferred_taxa_taxon_list_id LEFT JOIN esurveyor.moth_traits mt ON mt.tvk=cttl.external_key #joins# WHERE o.survey_id=#survey_id# #filters# GROUP BY 1, 2
